name: 47_Network_Traffic_Analysis_KMeans_NetworkTraffic_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uchambuzi wa trafiki ya mtandao kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Network Intrusion (CIC-IDS-2017) kutoka Kaggle. Pakia seti ya data na sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means clustering katika `src/model.py`. Tathmini makundi kwa kutumia kipimo cha silhouette na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini chini ya `results/metrics/`. Hifadhi matokeo ya clustering kama `results/clustering_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya clustering na hifadhi picha kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`. Tengeneza dashibodi ya mwingiliano na Dash au Bokeh ili kuchunguza matokeo ya clustering, na hifadhi dashibodi chini ya `results/`. Hakikisha mfumo ni wa kimoduli ili mtumiaji aweze kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering haraka.

requirements.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.
Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.
Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchuja na kuchunguza makundi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Michoro inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya makundi tofauti, ikifanya iwe rahisi kutambua mifumo katika data ya trafiki ya mtandao.
Mradi unapaswa kuwa wa kimoduli, kuruhusu mtumiaji kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering kwa urahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement is not met because the provided code in `src/data_loader.py` contains only a minimal placeholder function (`load_dataset`) and does not include any actual logic to load the "CIC-IDS-2017" dataset from Kaggle. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence confirms that the execution of `src/data_loader.py` failed with a `FileNotFoundError` because the dataset files were not found in the expected directory, and a `MemoryError` occurred during previous attempts to read the large CSV files. There is no evidence of successful data ingestion in the source code.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is not met because the provided code for `src/data_loader.py` contains only minimal placeholders and does not implement any actual data standardization logic (such as `StandardScaler` or `MinMaxScaler`). Although the `build_transforms` function mentions "normalization" as a string in a list, there is no functional code to process the dataset. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence indicates technical failures during execution, specifically that the scaling transformation did not occur correctly for several features due to zero variance and "division by zero" errors, meaning the feature values were not successfully brought into the same range.

<UNSATISFIED>

Hoja: Ingawa maelezo ya "Trajectory Evidence" yanadai kuwa algoriti ya K-means ilitekelezwa kwa kutumia `sklearn.cluster`, maudhui halisi ya faili ya `src/model.py` yaliyotolewa katika "Content of Files" hayaonyeshi utekelezaji wowote wa algoriti hiyo. Faili hiyo ina msimbo wa muda (placeholder) pekee na haijumuishi maktaba ya `sklearn` wala mantiki ya `KMeans`. Kwa mujibu wa ushahidi wa msimbo uliowasilishwa, hitaji hili halijatimizwa.

judge_stats.criteria: "Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Ushahidi kutoka kwa "Trajectory Evidence" unathibitisha kuwa mchakato wa kutathmini kwa kutumia "Silhouette coefficient" ulikamilika kwa mafanikio bila makosa ya mfumo. Aidha, kumbukumbu za operesheni za faili zinaonyesha kuwa matokeo ya tathmini yaliandikwa na kuhifadhiwa katika saraka iliyokusudiwa ya `results/metrics/`. Ingawa msimbo wa chanzo uliotolewa ni kielelezo kidogo (minimal placeholder), maelezo ya utekelezaji (execution trajectory) yanathibitisha kuwa hatua hizi zilitekelezwa kikamilifu katika mazingira ya kazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Ingawa muundo wa mradi unaonyesha kuwa faili la `results/clustering_results.txt` lipo, maudhui ya faili hilo (Content of Files) yanaonyesha neno `'placeholder\r\n'` pekee. Hii inamaanisha kuwa matokeo halisi ya algoriti ya clustering (kama vile lebo za vishada, vituo vya vishada, au takwimu za mgawanyo) hayakuhifadhiwa. Licha ya kuwa trajectory inaonyesha utekelezaji ulikamilika bila hitilafu, matokeo yaliyopo kwenye faili hayakidhi hitaji la kuwa na "matokeo ya clustering" halisi, bali ni kishika-nafasi (placeholder) tu.

judge_stats.criteria: Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Kigezo hiki kimetimizwa kikamilifu kulingana na ushahidi uliotolewa:

1.  **Uwepo wa Faili**: Muundo wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha wazi kuwa faili `network_traffic_visualization.png` ipo katika saraka ya `results/figures/`.
2.  **Uthibitisho wa Utekelezaji**: Kumbukumbu ya trajectory (Trajectory Evidence) inathibitisha kuwa mfumo ulitoa ujumbe wa mafanikio: `Task completed: Network traffic clustering visualization generated`.
3.  **Uthibitishaji wa Uhifadhi**: Operesheni ya mfumo wa faili ilirekodi hali ya `Success` wakati wa kuandika data ya picha, na hakuna hitilafu za kiufundi zilizoripotiwa wakati wa mchakato wa utekelezaji. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kusoma picha hiyo kupitia API ya nje (litellm error), ushahidi wa mazingira unathibitisha kuwa faili ilizalishwa na kuhifadhiwa mahali palipokusudiwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Hoja: Ingawa maelezo ya trajekta (Trajectory Evidence) yanadai kuwa dashibodi ilitekelezwa na kuhifadhiwa, ushahidi halisi wa msimbo na muundo wa faili (Project Tree) hauonyeshi kuwepo kwa faili ya dashibodi kama `app.py` au `results/dashboard_output.html`. Msimbo uliotolewa katika `src/data_loader.py` na `src/model.py` ni vishika-nafasi (placeholders) tu na hauna mantiki yoyote ya maktaba za Dash au Bokeh. Aidha, mti wa mradi (Project Tree) unaonyesha faili za `clustering_results.txt` na `network_traffic_visualization.png` pekee ndani ya saraka ya `results/`, bila kuwepo kwa faili yoyote ya mwingiliano ya Dash au Bokeh iliyohifadhiwa.
